findings.title: Invalid JSON syntax
findings.evidence: Line 4 contains a syntax error: the string value for key 'more' contains an unescaped double quote closing the string, followed by a colon and a malformed string literal with no closing quote. This will cause standard JSON parsers to fail to parse the file.
findings.suggested_comment: The changes to config.json introduce a syntax error on line 4. The value for 'more' is malformed and contains invalid quotes, which will prevent standard JSON parsers from reading the configuration file.
findings.fix_hint: Correct the string formatting on line 4 of config.json, ensuring that any internal double quotes are properly escaped and the string is closed.
